updated: 2026-04-19 post-parity-green plus 3 script-pruning batches and a CHANGELOG entry. Original snapshot was at e578cf2 (parity-green milestone); this refresh reflects the additional 5 commits that pruned 22 scripts.

baseline.note: Baseline is the frozen before-state. This final-state artifact is the diffable after-state across all phases of the cleanup plan. Each metric below is paired with its baseline value and an explicit delta.

defaultChecksPass.evidence: npm run check:green (agents:verify, public:boundaries:check, api:docs:check, imports:check:browser, pending:check, exports:parity:check) — all 6 checks exit 0 at SHA e5e45fe.

pendingWorkQuarantined.evidence: 2 *.pending.test.js files registered in tools/policies/pending-tests-policy.json with owner=doppler-cleanup and expires=2026-10-19. Default test lane excludes them; --include-pending opts in. npm run pending:check enforces policy.

cleanupClaimsBacked.evidence: This artifact plus docs/cleanup/baseline-2026-04-19.json form the before/after pair. Every phase commit points at the phase it advanced; counts match the git-observable state.

noInvariantSilentlyWeakened.evidence: No runtime-behavior changes in the parity work (only .d.ts and barrel re-exports). No config/rule files reduced. Agent instruction parity (agents:verify) passed before every commit. No CI wiring was added that would bypass review.

parity.note: No allowlist debt. Every drifting symbol either got a real declaration or the parity checker's two regex bugs were fixed.

docsMdTotal.note: general-invariants.md and javascript-invariants.md merged into full guides; baseline/final net is −1 because emoji.md moved in.

styleGuides.note: general-invariants.md and javascript-invariants.md folded into full guides; docs/style/emoji.md was added from root.

developerGuides.note: Phase 5 inventory committed but execution gated on architectural decision (inline-into-skills vs sibling-files vs shrink-and-keep vs delete-after-porting). See docs/cleanup/developer-guides-inventory-2026-04-19.json.

pendingTestJs.note: Migrated doppler-public-logits-api-contract and demo-import-surface off the regression lane (e415826).

total.note: Net -20: added 2 (pending:check, check:green) and removed 22 in three verified batches (c945f7b: 3 ci-aliases; b5e6656: 7 reporting orphans; 4754a61: 12 dev/experimental wrappers). Each removal grep-verified + git log -S verified to have zero callers outside package.json. Underlying tools remain reachable via direct node invocation. Target: 80 safe, 60 ambitious; current 90 sits between.

enforceableChecksAdded.name: pending:check
enforceableChecksAdded.enforces: every *.pending.test.js has a policy entry with owner + expires|issue; expired/orphan entries fail the check

enforceableChecksAdded.name: check:green (aggregator)
enforceableChecksAdded.enforces: default PR-gate read-only chain: agents:verify → public:boundaries:check → api:docs:check → imports:check:browser → pending:check → exports:parity:check

enforceableChecksAdded.name: exports:parity:check with allowlist
enforceableChecksAdded.enforces: .js/.d.ts value-export parity across src/**; allowlist entries require owner + expires|issue; expired or unused entries fail the check

checkerBugsFoundAndFixed.bug: grouped-export regex captured // and /* */ comments inside { ... } blocks, silently dropping names that followed an inline comment on one side (kv-cache, debug/index barrel)

function-export regex didn't match `async function*` generator syntax, producing spurious onlyInDts drift for storage/shard-manager streamShardRange, safetensors-parser streamTensorData, experimental browser Q4K/F16 chunk streams

ciGating.note: npm run check:green is documented in docs/contributing.md but not wired into .github/workflows. Adding a workflow that runs check:green on pull_request is a one-file addition; left to user choice.

developerGuidesFold.note: 20 guides mapped in docs/cleanup/developer-guides-inventory-2026-04-19.json to doppler-convert/kernel-reviewer/debug skills. Execution blocked on the architectural decision (inline vs sibling-files vs shrink vs delete).

styleDocsFurtherCollapse.note: Phase 4 steps 1–2 done (both *-invariants.md merged). Step 4 (rename guides, drop `-style-guide` suffix) deferred; blocked on tests/config/diffusion-gpu-contract-docs.test.js which reads command-interface-design-guide.md and harness-style-guide.md by literal path.

npmScriptAudit.note: 22 of the audit's 39 reducible scripts removed (3 ci-aliases in c945f7b, 7 reporting orphans in b5e6656, 12 dev/experimental wrappers in 4754a61). Remaining candidates: 6 conservatively kept (typecheck:source-runtime, agents:freshness, conflicts:check, api:docs:sync, digests:check-conversion, lean:check — each has a plausible local-dev justification despite zero external refs) and the 32 verify:<modelId> aliases which are policy-driven by tools/sync-registry-scripts.js and need a generator change, not a script-list edit. Net 110 → 90.
